untranslatable_reason: Signal requires portfolio-level selection based on relative performance ranking (winner vs loser portfolio construction), which requires cross-sectional analysis and historical return ranking. This cannot be expressed using single-security indicators. The 'H-month holding period' is variable and requires dynamic parameterization. The signal also requires market-adjusted returns and comparative portfolio analysis that are not supported by the allowed single-instrument indicators.
translation_notes: This is a cross-sectional momentum/relative value strategy requiring: (1) ranking universe of securities by prior returns, (2) constructing winner/loser portfolios, (3) calculating differential returns, (4) holding for variable periods. Single-instrument technical indicators cannot capture portfolio construction logic. Recommend implementing as custom multi-leg portfolio strategy outside standard backtest engine rules.
